description: Registry of all output sinks and their contracts. All outputs route through the-pen first.

sweeper.name: the-pen
sweeper.description: Universal intake gate. Every output is sent here for receipt, logging, and routing confirmation before any downstream sink.

sinks.name: supabase-persist
sinks.description: Persists normalised records to Supabase. Primary long-term store.

sinks.name: tenant-notification
sinks.description: Sends email/in-app notifications to tenant users on key events

sinks.name: mcp-relay
sinks.description: Relays structured events to TML-4PM/mcp-command-centre for agentic processing

sinks.name: template-render
sinks.description: Triggers template rendering pipeline — fills variables, emits rendered output

sinks.name: export-file
sinks.description: Generates CSV/JSON/PDF exports and pushes to S3 or Supabase Storage
